lessons_list: ALWAYS fetch feeRateBps live before every order. Stale rates cause silent rejections.
S10 max_minutes_remaining is in MINUTES — code converts to seconds internally. Do not compare raw.
S10 sports requires min_probability=0.93 not 0.90. Late-reversal risk is real in final minutes.
S1 NegRisk: reject legs with yes_bid < 0.02. Zero bids = stale market = phantom arb signal.
S8: US politics markets have the most logical violations. Scan politics/* first.
Market cache is gzip-compressed to data/market_snapshot.json.gz and committed after each run.
S1 NegRisk arb: use YES ask (taker price) not YES mid for total_ask computation.
